prompt: Young woman in her early 20s with long flowing medium-brown wavy hair, fair skin with warm peachy undertone, and light blue eyes with a radiant wide smile, standing in a confident relaxed pose at a nighttime urban transit station. She wears a floor-length oversized glossy yellow PVC duster coat covered in scattered black ink illustrative tattoo-flash graphics — pyramids, globes, compass roses, pocket watches, angelic figures — over a fitted black scoop-neck ribbed tank top and rust terracotta orange distressed ripped denim jeans with an orange flannel shirt tied around her waist. Black fingerless leather gloves on both hands. Chunky neon yellow high-top sneakers with black laces emit a glowing light bleed onto the wet asphalt ground. Background is a blurred bokeh city night street with a curved tiled tunnel wall and illuminated transit boards to the left. A bold neon cyan digital illustration overlay erupts behind her — loose comic-style liquid drip shapes, flame tendrils, floating black stars, gold sparkle bursts, and loose ink sketch doodles of figures and architecture — framing her like an aura. Mixed-media aesthetic blending street photography with graffiti comic-book illustration. Dark cinematic lighting with neon cyan rim light, frontal cool fill, and emissive sneaker glow on the ground. Afrofuturist streetwear editorial, hyper-detailed, high contrast, graphic novel energy.
